prompt_rules.title_brief: LoomAntikRugs icin title baslangiclarini cesitlendir. Her ilanda ayni acilis kalibini kullanma. Ilk keyword bazen size ile, bazen color/pattern ile, bazen weave/origin ile baslasin. Ilk 2-4 kelimede surekli 'Vintage' ve 'Oushak/Noushak' kullanma. Bu kelimeler onemli ama her ilanin ilk kisminda mecburi degil; title icinde dogal bir yerde mutlaka gecmesi yeterli. Anahtar kelimeleri donustur: runner rug, area rug, Turkish rug, wool rug, medallion rug, distressed rug, handwoven rug, Anatolian rug gibi farkli yuksek niyetli acilislar kullan. Etsy title suggestion olarak 14 kelime civari veya altini tercih et; 140 karaktere yaklasmak zorunlu degil. Karakteri sisirmek icin anlamsiz tekrar yapma. Ancak baslik 110 karakterin altina dusmesin; 110-140 araliginda, dolu ama temiz bir yapi kur.
prompt_rules.tag_strategy: 13 tag icinde olcu az kullaniliyor; mutlaka 2-3 adet olcu iceren tag olsun. Bu 2-3 tag birbirinden farkli kombinasyonlar olmali: biri size + rug type, biri size + dominant color, biri gerekiyorsa size + room/use. Geri kalan taglerde renk, pattern, materyal, origin ve room fit dagilimi dogal olsun. Ayni kelime grubunu tekrar etme; tum tagler kopyala-yapistir hissi vermesin.
prompt_rules.description_brief: SEO uyumlu ama dogal dursun. Bizim magazanin premium vintage rug tonunu koru. Keyword stuffing yapma.
prompt_rules.title_rules:
SIZE RULE: Round each ft dimension to the nearest whole number (2.8x9.9 -> "3x10", 3.2x5.7 -> "3x6", 3.6x9.3 -> "4x9"). Use the ROUNDED size in the title.
Pack in: size, style, colors, pattern, material, origin, room use, Etsy search terms.

For LoomAntikRugs, rotate title openings aggressively. Do NOT let consecutive listings feel like clones.
- Some titles may start with rounded size.
- Some may start with weave/material + origin.
- Some may start with color/pattern phrase.
- Some may start with room-intent or rug type phrase if it still sounds premium.

IMPORTANT:
- Title must be at least 110 characters long.
- Prefer 14 words or fewer when the title still feels complete and SEO-strong.
- Reaching 140 characters is NOT mandatory; do not pad the title just to hit the limit.
- Keep the title ideally in the 110-140 character range.
- Avoid repetition, especially repeating words like "runner", "rug", "vintage", "oushak", or the same noun twice unless absolutely necessary.
- If "runner" is already used once, do not also force "runner rug" again later unless it materially improves the keyword.
- Do not always begin the title with "Vintage".
- Do not always begin the title with "Oushak" or "Noushak".
- "Vintage" and "Oushak/Noushak" are still valuable keywords, but they should appear naturally somewhere else in the title when not used first.
- Avoid repeating the same first 3 words across listings.

Use ONE of these structures — vary between listings, do NOT always use the same one:

Structure A (size-first): [rounded size] ft [Style] [Origin] [Type] Rug | [Color] [Pattern] [Material] [Room]
  Example: "3x10 ft Turkish Runner | Faded Red Medallion Wool Hallway Carpet | Vintage Oushak Accent"

Structure B (material-first): [Weave] [Origin] [Type] [Size] ft – [Color adjective] [Color] – [Vintage/Age] [Style] [Room]
  Example: "Handwoven Turkish Runner 3x10 ft – Muted Sage Green & Terracotta – Vintage Oushak Wool Hallway Accent"

Structure C (visual-first): [Color/Pattern phrase] [Type] [Size] ft | [Material] [Origin] [Vintage/Age] [Style] Accent
  Example: "Faded Medallion Runner 3x10 ft | Wool Turkish Vintage Oushak Hallway Accent"

Choose the structure that sounds most natural for this specific rug.
prompt_rules.tag_rules:
CRITICAL: Tags must be specific to THIS rug's photo — color, pattern, texture, size, origin you actually see.
Each tag = strong Etsy long-tail keyword phrase (2-3 words, not a single word).
Derive directly from: the visible colors, pattern type, weave style, probable origin, size category, room fit.
Do NOT use generic or copy-paste tags — every tag must reflect what you observe in this specific rug.

Think like an Etsy SEO expert. Cover a wide range of what buyers actually search for.
REQUIRED slots (use ALL core categories below, then fill remaining slots with color/pattern/texture tags):
- SIZE tags (REQUIRED 2-3 tags minimum):
  slot 1: rounded size + rug type -> "3x8 runner rug"
  slot 2: rounded size + dominant color -> "3x8 beige rug"
  slot 3: optional but preferred rounded size + room/use -> "3x8 hallway rug" or rounded size + style
- Core type (2-3): include a strong Oushak/Noushak or Turkish style tag when visually appropriate, and include a handmade/vintage/material tag.
- Room fit (2-3): kitchen, hallway, entryway, living room, bedroom, etc.
- Color / pattern / texture (remaining): what you actually see — faded, muted, distressed, medallion, floral, tribal, etc.

Do NOT repeat the same word combination.
Do NOT let size usage drop below 2 tags.
Prefer 3 size tags when they still sound natural and non-repetitive.

sabit_no_extra_fees:
✨ No Hidden Costs – Ever!
All customs duties and import taxes are on us. What you see is what you pay — shop freely and with full confidence.
sabit_easy_returns:
↩️ Hassle-Free Returns
Not fully satisfied? We'll make it right. Contact us within 14 days of delivery and we'll walk you through the return process — simple and stress-free.
sabit_alt:
🧼 Cleaned & Ready to Use
Every rug is professionally cleaned before it leaves us. No odors, no hidden wear — just genuine vintage character arriving at your door.

🧽 Care Instructions
Easy to live with: light vacuuming regularly and gentle spot cleaning as needed. No specialist care required.

🚚 Shipping & Delivery:
- Dispatched within 1 business day
- Worldwide delivery in 2–4 business days
- Carefully packed to arrive in perfect condition

❌ Cancellation Policy:
Orders can be cancelled any time before dispatch — just send us a message.

🏠 Trade & Wholesale:
Interior designers and decorators are welcome. Contact us for bulk sourcing and trade pricing.

🎨 A Note on Colors:
Photos are taken in natural daylight. Colors may appear slightly different depending on your screen settings.

✨ Every piece here is one of a kind. If this one caught your eye, trust that feeling.
It's cleaned, carefully packed, and ready to find its new home.
